title: BubbleChat
description: a modern, config-first chat plugin for Paper 1.21+ designed to replace the “stack of chat plugins” approach.
body:
## 💬 BubbleChat — The Ultimate Chat System for Modern Servers

### ![stat1](https://www.codefactor.io/Content/badges/APlus.svg)

Tired of boring, limited chat plugins?  
**BubbleChat** is a powerful, modern, and highly configurable chat plugin built for **Paper 26.x.x**, giving you full control over how players communicate on your server.

Whether you run a Survival server, SMP, Skyblock, or a full network — BubbleChat delivers **clean chat, advanced moderation, and beautiful formatting** in one lightweight plugin.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🎨 **MiniMessage support** — gradients, hover text, click actions & more  
- 🌍 **Multiple chat channels** — global, local (proximity), staff  
- 📩 **Private messaging** — `/msg`, `/reply`, SocialSpy  
- 🚫 **Anti-spam & anti-flood** — keeps chat clean automatically  
- 🛑 **Chat moderation tools** — mute, ignore, clearchat, filters  
- 📢 **Announcements & chat toggles**  
- ⚙️ **Highly configurable** — simple YAML, no bloat  
- 🧩 **PlaceholderAPI support**  
- 🔗 **DiscordSRV compatible**  
- 🚀 **Optimised & lightweight** — built for performance  
- 🤖 Automatic response — Save staff time from answering pointless questions

---

## 🎯 Why BubbleChat?

- ✔ One plugin instead of multiple chat addons  
- ✔ Easy setup with powerful customization  
- ✔ Suitable for both small servers and large communities  
- ✔ Actively developed and supported  

---

## 📌 Requirements

- Paper / Purpur **1.21+**  
- **Java 17+**

---

## 🚀 Getting Started

1. Drop the plugin into your `/plugins` folder  
2. Restart the server  
3. Configure it to your liking  
4. Enjoy a **cleaner, smarter, better chat experience**

---

**Upgrade your server chat today with BubbleChat.**  
Stop settling for default chat — take full control.
